whatWasImplemented: src/app/dashboard/settings/layout.tsx — wraps all /dashboard/settings/* sub-routes with a two-column layout (desktop) or stacked-plus-tabs layout (mobile). No auth check needed — the parent /dashboard/layout.tsx already redirects guests to /login, which transitively protects every sub-route (VAL-SET-007).

src/app/dashboard/settings/settings-sidebar.tsx — client component rendering the 5-item sub-nav. Desktop: vertical column (w-48). Mobile (<640px): horizontal scrollable tab strip above content. Active highlighting uses isActiveSubRoute() from nav-items.ts (prefix match with segment boundary so 'sitemap' doesn't match 'site').

src/app/dashboard/settings/nav-items.ts — canonical SETTINGS_NAV_ITEMS array (Site / Knowledge / Responses / Escalation / Billing) + isActiveSubRoute helper. Single source of truth for the sub-nav order (VAL-SET-002).
src/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx — replaced the old settings content with a `redirect('/dashboard/settings/site')` (VAL-SET-001).
Placeholder pages at /dashboard/settings/{knowledge,responses,escalation} — 'Shipping soon' stubs replaced by M5/M6/M7. Keeps the sub-nav links live today and prevents 404s on clicks.
src/__tests__/settings-nav.test.ts — 7 unit tests pinning down nav-item ordering (VAL-SET-002), link scoping, and isActiveSubRoute edge cases including the prefix-collision case (sitemap vs site).
src/__tests__/main-nav-active.test.ts — 6 unit tests for the new longest-prefix resolver (see related main-nav change below).
whatWasLeftUndone: Playwright-driven VAL-SET-003 active-state screenshots and VAL-SET-008 mobile viewport collapse — logic unit-tested; browser confirmation batches with end-of-mission pass.
discoveredIssues: Added a sibling cross-milestone change for M4F1 to make sense: Billing was moved from /dashboard/billing to /dashboard/settings/billing (so the sub-nav's Billing tab actually lives inside the settings layout). Added a `/dashboard/billing` redirect page for backward compatibility with Stripe's saved return URLs. Main sidebar nav-items.ts updated accordingly; resolveActiveHref exported for longest-prefix active-state so /dashboard/settings/billing highlights Billing (not Settings). Documented in the main-nav-active test.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 338 passed / 1 skipped / 48 files (+13 new across settings-nav + main-nav-active).
